articles.description: Zvamaida Murwira President Mnangagwa has highlighted the role played by Artificial Intelligence, saying AI is at the heart of seismic technological transformation, reshaping economies and societies at an unprecedented pace....The post President hails AI as catalyst for modernisation, launches Zimbabwe National AI Strategy appeared first on herald.

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Robber jailed 15 years
more.description: Source: Robber jailed 15 years – herald Yeukai Karengezeka-Chisepo Court Correspondent ROBBER Gift Mwaudzeni from Epworth has been sentenced to an effective 15 years in prison after being convicted of two counts of armed robbery. Harare regional magistrate Ms Learnomore Mapiye yesterday handed down the sentence for his role in a violent robbery that occurred [...] The post Robber jailed 15 years appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.description: Source: Dealer sells vehicle held as collateral – herald Zvikomborero Parafini Court Reporter A HARARE car dealer has appeared in court accused of selling a client’s high-value vehicle, which he was holding as collateral for a small loan in a case involving US$200 000 worth of trust property. more.title: Zim has enough forex
more.description: Source: Zim has enough forex – herald Debra Matabvu Senior Reporter ZIMBABWE has sufficient foreign currency to cover all bona fide imports of goods and services for public sector service providers following a steady increase in foreign currency receipts and reserves over the past few years, the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe has said. more.title: The Nigerian Connection: Inside the Fraud Syndicate Impersonating General Chiwenga (SEE PHONE NUMBERS)
more.description: The corridors of power in Harare are usually shielded by layers of bureaucracy and high-level security, yet a digital breach has managed to bypass the armed guards and the tinted windows of government motorcades. A sophisticated cross-border fraud plot, orchestrated by what investigators are calling the “Nigerian Connection,” has directly targeted the highest offices in [...] The post The Nigerian Connection: Inside the Fraud Syndicate Impersonating General Chiwenga (SEE PHONE NUMBERS) first appeared on My Zimbabwe News .
